title: Senior Frontend Developer
summary: Lead frontend architecture and delivery across our client engagements.
responsibilities: Build and maintain complex frontend applications for client projects
Set frontend architecture and coding standards across the team
Review code and mentor mid-level and junior engineers
Collaborate closely with design and backend teams on API contracts
requirements: 4+ years of professional experience with React and TypeScript
Experience with Next.js or a similar server-rendered React framework
Strong understanding of web performance and accessibility
Comfortable working directly with clients on requirements

title: Backend Developer
summary: Design and build the backend services powering our client products.
responsibilities: Design and implement REST/GraphQL APIs for client applications
Model and optimize PostgreSQL schemas for scale
Write automated tests for critical backend logic
Participate in code review and on-call rotation
requirements: 3+ years of experience building backend services with Node.js
Solid understanding of relational database design
Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
Comfortable debugging production issues under time pressure

title: UI/UX Designer
summary: Own product design across client engagements, from research through polished UI.
responsibilities: Run lightweight user research to inform design decisions
Produce wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI designs
Collaborate closely with engineers to ensure designs are implemented faithfully
Maintain design systems across client projects
requirements: 3+ years of product design experience
A portfolio demonstrating end-to-end product design work
Proficiency with Figma and prototyping tools
Comfortable presenting and defending design decisions to clients

title: QA Engineer
summary: Build and maintain automated test coverage across client products.
responsibilities: Design and implement automated test suites using Playwright and Selenium
Identify gaps in test coverage and prioritize based on risk
Work with engineers to reproduce and triage reported bugs
Maintain CI test pipelines and keep flaky tests in check
requirements: 2+ years of experience in test automation
Hands-on experience with Playwright, Selenium, or similar tools
Strong understanding of testing strategy across unit, integration, and end-to-end levels
Comfortable reading application code to write effective tests

title: DevOps Engineer
summary: Build and maintain the infrastructure and pipelines behind our client deployments.
responsibilities: Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines for client projects
Manage containerized infrastructure on AWS and Kubernetes
Set up monitoring, logging, and alerting for production systems
Support engineers with infrastructure and deployment issues
requirements: 3+ years of experience in a DevOps or platform engineering role
Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes in production
Experience with AWS infrastructure and infrastructure-as-code tools
Strong troubleshooting skills under production pressure
